embed.title: !quest
embed.description: Alerts for field research task rewards at pokestops.

fields.name: Pokemon rewards
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest pikachu`
`{{prefix}}quest pikachu charmander d:500` — either pokemon as a reward, within 500m
`{{prefix}}quest shiny pikachu` — only tasks that can give a shiny

fields.name: Item rewards — use underscores for multi-word names
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest razz_berry`
`{{prefix}}quest golden_razz_berry`
`{{prefix}}quest rare_candy`
`{{prefix}}quest silver_pinap_berry`
`{{prefix}}quest fast_tm charged_tm`

Use `{{prefix}}info items` to see every item name the bot recognises — the list it prints is the exact token to use here (replacing spaces with underscores).

fields.name: Stardust / mega energy / candy
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest stardust:1000` — tasks rewarding 1000+ stardust
`{{prefix}}quest energy:charizard` — Mega Charizard energy
`{{prefix}}quest candy:lapras` — rare candy awarded specifically for Lapras

Multiple rewards in one command are OR-matched:
`{{prefix}}quest pikachu rare_candy silver_pinap_berry`

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete when the quest expires
`edit` — single message edited in place
`ping`

fields.name: Remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}quest remove pikachu`
`{{prefix}}quest remove all_items` — every item-reward rule
`{{prefix}}quest remove all_pokemon` — every pokemon-reward rule
`{{prefix}}quest remove stardust`
`{{prefix}}untrack id:<N>`
